phrases.context: Use this to describe your mother's profession.

phrases.english: My father works in a bank.
phrases.context: Use this to describe your father's place of work.

phrases.english: I have one sister and two brothers.
phrases.pronunciation: Ladai ukht wahida wa akhwan ithnan.
phrases.context: Use this to state the number of siblings you have.
Use this when introducing your husband to someone.
Use this to express pride in your children's intelligence.
